name: Arena Reit.
analysis: ARF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.2500, stop A$3.0195, target A$3.5800 (1.43:1) — then trail it.
